title: as + adj./adv. + as...（同等比較）

formulas.formula: as + adj./adv. + as + 比較對象
formulas.zh: 表示兩者程度相同；用於正面比較

formulas.formula: not as/so + adj./adv. + as + 比較對象
formulas.zh: 表示一方不如另一方；用於否定比較

explanation: 此句型用於比較兩個事物或人物在某一特性上的程度是否相同。正面用法 as...as 表「和……一樣」，否定用法 not as/so...as 表「不如……」。比較對象須詞性相對等，如名詞對名詞、句子對句子。可於第一個 as 和形容詞/副詞間加倍數詞（twice as、three times as）表倍數關係。此句型適用於日常比較、論述對比等情境。易混淆點：must not confuse 比較對象的詞性，避免違反平行結構原則。

examples.eng: This smartphone is as expensive as that one, but it has better features.
examples.chi: 這支智慧型手機和那支一樣昂貴，但功能更好。

examples.eng: She speaks English as fluently as a native speaker does.
examples.chi: 她說英文和母語使用者一樣流暢。

examples.eng: The project is not as difficult as we initially thought.
examples.chi: 這個專案不如我們最初想的那麼困難。

examples.eng: This year's sales are three times as high as last year's.
examples.chi: 今年的銷售額是去年的三倍。

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：確認比較對象詞性是否對等。如比較人物用名詞或代詞，比較動作用副詞。常見錯誤：忽略倍數詞與 as...as 搭配，或混淆 as...as 與 than 的用法。as...as 表相同；than 表不同。

examples.test: Tom is as tall as his brother. / Tom is taller than his brother.
examples.result: → 前句表身高相同；後句表湯姆更高。兩句意義完全相反，需注意句型選擇。

examples.test: She works twice as hard as before. (正確) vs. She works twice harder than before. (錯誤)
examples.result: → 倍數詞只能搭配 as...as，不能與 than 搭配。harder 是比較級，與倍數詞衝突。

examples.test: The new product is not as popular as the old one. (正確)
examples.result: → 否定比較中，as...as 更常用於書面語；so...as 則多出現於否定句且較少見。

extension.note: 口訣：as...as 夾形容詞或副詞，比較對象須平行；倍數詞只配 as...as，否定用 not as/so...as。

parts: that one, but it costs much less.
exercises.sentence: This camera is as high-quality as that one, but it costs much less.
exercises.translation: 這台相機和那台一樣高品質，但價格便宜得多。

exercises.sentence: He doesn't run as fast as his competitive teammates do.
exercises.translation: 他跑的速度不如他的競爭隊友那麼快。

exercises.sentence: The summer project is twice as challenging as the winter one.
exercises.translation: 夏季專案的難度是冬季專案的兩倍。

parts: a professional interpreter that everyone was impressed.
exercises.sentence: She spoke so articulately as a professional interpreter that everyone was impressed.
exercises.translation: 她說話的清晰程度就像專業口譯員一樣，令所有人印象深刻。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的同等比較句型，說明兩物外觀相似
mc_exercises.question_eng: This dress is _______ beautiful as the one you wore last week.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (as)。肯定的同等比較使用 as...as 句型，表「和...一樣」。B 選項 so 只能用於否定句 (not so...as)。C 選項 more 用於比較級 (more beautiful than)。D 選項 very 是強調詞，不符合比較句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的否定比較形式，說明某人表現不如他人
mc_exercises.question_eng: My brother is not _______ tall as my father, so he still hopes to grow taller.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (so...as)。否定比較句中，not so/as...as 皆可接受，但 so...as 更常見於否定句。句子應填 not so...as。A 選項 as...as 用於肯定句。C 選項為比較級結構。D 選項 very 無法形成比較句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確句型，使用倍數詞表達兩物數量關係
mc_exercises.question_eng: This project requires twice _______ much effort as the previous one did.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (as)。倍數表達使用 倍數詞 + as + adj./adv. + as 結構，如 twice as much as、three times as many as。B 選項 than 用於比較級。C 選項 so 只能用於否定句。D 選項 more 為比較級用法，與倍數詞搭配不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成複雜的同等比較句子，涉及副詞修飾的動詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The Olympic athlete runs _______ swiftly _______ her coach demonstrated during the training session, which impressed all spectators.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (as...as)。副詞 swiftly 用於肯定的同等比較，需用 as swiftly as 結構，表「跑得和教練示範時一樣快」。B 選項混用 so 與 than。C 選項為比較級。D 選項混用 as 與 than，違反句型規則。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這個數學考試和上次一樣難。
translation_exercises.answer: This math exam is as difficult as the last one.
key_points: 比較對象相同（exam vs. one）
hints: 提示1：使用 as + adj. + as + 比較對象的基本結構
提示2：注意比較對象詞性要相等，此處用 one 代替 exam 避免重複

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你的英文發音不如我的清楚。
translation_exercises.answer: Your English pronunciation is not as clear as mine.
hints: 提示1：否定比較用 not as + adj. + as 表『不如』的意思
提示2：比較對象可用代詞 mine 取代 my pronunciation，但務必詞性對等

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影三倍長於那部，卻不如那部有趣。
translation_exercises.answer: This movie is three times as long as that one, but it is not as interesting as that one.
key_points: 複合句結構（but 連接兩個比較）
as...as 與 not as...as 混用
hints: 提示1：倍數表達放在第一個 as 前（three times as + adj. + as），第二個比較用否定形式
提示2：複合比較中兩個比較對象都須明確，避免指代不清或詞性不符

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管手機螢幕和電視螢幕一樣亮，但看電視對眼睛的傷害不如一整天看手機嚴重。
translation_exercises.answer: Although the smartphone screen is as bright as the TV screen, watching TV is not as harmful to the eyes as using a phone all day.
key_points: as...as 正面比較與 not as...as 否定比較並存
句式複雜度：動名詞與名詞片語作比較對象
hints: 提示1：多層比較需注意各自比較對象的平行性；第一組比較 screen...screen，第二組比較 watching...using
提示2：易犯錯為混淆抽象行為（watching/using）與具體物體（screen）的詞性，務必確保同類事物相比
